s: In 1993, Nate Minchey suited up for BOS as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.550, WHIP 1.300, SO 18, WAR 0.300.
In 1994, Nate Minchey suited up for BOS as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 8.610, WHIP 2.520, SO 15, WAR 0.400.
In 1996, Nate Minchey suited up for BOS as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 15.000, WHIP 3.500, SO 4, WAR 0.000.
Changed teams after the previous season (BOS -> COL).
In 1997, Nate Minchey suited up for COL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 13.500, WHIP 3.000, SO 1, WAR 0.000. Notable context: Joined COL.
